arts.ttl: Club Brugge boss shows Brendan Rodgers admiration as his side prepare to face 'quite complete' Celtic
arts.sum: Club Brugge boss Nicky Hayen has spoken out ahead of his side’s clash against Celtic in matchday five of the Champions League league phase. He explained: “You see that he’s a coach who really wants to play football, even from the back.

arts.ttl: Cameron Carter Vickers reveals the Champions League points tally Celtic targeted before a ball was kicked
arts.sum: It was around that (10) and I think we feel as a group, we're probably pretty close to getting out of this kind of group phase of the tournament. He said: "At the beginning of the competition, we kind of outlined how many points we wanted to reach.

arts.ttl: “Shouting in that taxi” – Player reveals secret about trip to join Celtic, excitement with agent
arts.sum: Arne Engels arrived at Celtic on summer transfer deadline day with Brendan Rodgers’ side signing him from FC Augsburg, a year after he joined them from Club Brugge. The midfielder has impressed for Celtic this season, scoring three goals and registering six assists from 15 games. His performances have also helped him make his debut The post “Shouting in that taxi” – Player reveals secret about trip to join Celtic, excitement with agent appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Predicted Celtic XI to face Club Brugge as masked man could be handed recall in latest Champions League escapade
arts.sum: The Hoops can take a huge step towards the knockout stage with three points against the Belgian league champions

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart gets slammed in front of John McGinn for 'not really appreciating' Celtic player
arts.sum: Given that Nicolas Kuhn scored again for Celtic at the weekend, presenter Darrell Currie and former right-back Alan Hutton were poking fun at Michael Stewart for his past doubts over the German star. John McGinn told Michael Stewart ‘doesn’t appreciate’ Celtic star Nicolas Kuhn
